post.description: Emit a domain event for a running job. The KS ingests the event onto its EventBus, which triggers SSE delivery to the frontend, cache invalidation, and job state transitions (terminal events like mark:assist-finished transition the job to complete).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Job ID the event belongs to

type.description: EventBus channel name (e.g. mark:progress, mark:assist-finished, yield:progress)

202.description: Event accepted and ingested onto the EventBus
